tool_args.label: Queens Bus Network Redesign Proposed Final Plan Addendum
tool_args.raw_text: Proposed Final Plan Addendum published December 2024. 124 total routes (vs. 113 existing), 94 Local routes (vs. 83 existing) including 25 Rush Routes, 30 Express routes (vs. 30 existing).

payload.description: Queens Bus Network Redesign Proposed Final Plan Addendum published December 2024

tool_args.label: Redesign Strategies
tool_args.raw_text: The project team used seven redesign strategies: Improve Route Design, Enhance Connectivity, Improve Frequency, Balance Bus Stops, Expand Bus Priority with NYC DOT, Improve Transit Equity, Improve Accessibility

payload.claim_text: The project team used seven redesign strategies: Improve Route Design, Enhance Connectivity, Improve Frequency, Balance Bus Stops, Expand Bus Priority with NYC DOT, Improve Transit Equity, Improve Accessibility
strategies: Expand Bus Priority with NYC DOT

evidence_refs.source_quote: The project team used seven redesign strategies :
• Improve Route Design • Enhance Connectivity • Improve Frequency • Balance Bus Stops • Expand Bus Priority with NYC DOT • Improve Transit Equity • Improve Accessibility

tool_args.label: Route Types
tool_args.raw_text: Introducing Route Types: Local Routes (Green) connecting local neighborhoods; Limited Routes (Red) serving high demand corridors with frequent service; SBS Routes (Blue) connecting key destinations across longer distances; Express Routes (Dark Green) connecting outer borough neighborhoods directly to Manhattan; Rush Routes (Purple) connecting outer borough neighborhoods quickly to bus and subway hubs

payload.claim_text: Route types in the new Queens bus network include Local, Limited, SBS, Express, and Rush

tool_args.label: Q85 Rush Route
tool_args.raw_text: Q85 Rush Route: Service from Rosedale to Jamaica. Serves Merrick Blvd corridor. Rush segment on Merrick Blvd. Underlying local service provided by the Q5.

payload.description: Service from Rosedale to Jamaica, serves Merrick Blvd corridor, rush segment on Merrick Blvd

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Serves Merrick Blvd corridor • Local stop spacing between Rosedale and Merrick Blvd corridor • Rush segment on Merrick Blvd • Serves key destinations along Merrick Blvd • Provides faster service to key transfer points in Jamaica • Underlying local service provided by the Q5

tool_args.label: Q111 Rush Route
tool_args.raw_text: Q111 Rush Route: Service from Rosedale to Jamaica. Serves Guy R Brewer Blvd corridor. Rush segment on Guy R Brewer Blvd. Underlying local service provided by the Q115.

payload.description: Service from Rosedale to Jamaica, serves Guy R Brewer Blvd corridor, rush segment on Guy R Brewer Blvd

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Serves Guy R Brewer Blvd corridor • Local stop spacing on 147th Avenue • Rush segment on Guy R Brewer Blvd • Serves key destinations along Guy R Brewer Blvd • Provides faster service to key transfer points in Jamaica • Underlying local service provided by the Q115

tool_args.label: Implementation
tool_args.raw_text: Implementation: Two phases aligned with regular seasonal service changes. Large-scale marketing and public education campaign. Digital and print materials. Briefings with elected officials, Community Boards and other stakeholders. Pop-up events at key locations. Extensive Customer Ambassador program.
